message:
test(unit): expand output + embedder inline tests (4→43, 7→42, 7→30, 3→27) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Added 121 new inline unit tests across 4 under-tested modules:
- table.rs: column builder, cell formatting, alignment, truncation, ANSI strip, width calc, JSON/plain render
- format.rs: OutputFormat parsing/display, EffectiveFormat, Style colors, severity/status helpers
- error_renderer.rs: exhaustive error code mapping, plain/JSON rendering, remediation, convenience fns
- search/embedder.rs: EmbedError display/source, EmbedderTier traits, mock Embedder trait impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
